title: Veteran Squad Leader
author: seventhcodex

blessings.name: Cranial Grounding
blessings.description: Targets receive stacks on headshot (melee). At max stacks, target takes increased damage for a duration.

blessings.name: Heatsink
blessings.description: Charged melee attacks generate less heat.

weapons.name: M35 Magnacore Mk II Plasma Gun

blessings.name: Rising Heat
blessings.description: Increased critical chance and critical damage based on current heat.

description: Team support through CC and coherency buffs. Voice of Command + Duty and Honour keystone with Survivalist aura.
